title: selaginella lingulata
intro: Selaginella lingulata is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as a type of resurrection fern due to its unique ability to survive in dry conditions by drying out its leaves and reviving when water becomes available. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Selaginella lingulata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
